parameters.name: SizePage
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return.

parameters.name: IsVisible
parameters.description: If true return visible ressources, if not those which are not.

schema.description:
Allow to get detailed Pricing table subresources.

| Key | Description |
|---|---|
| all | Add all subressources.|
| Segment | Add details about the related segment.|
| UserCreation | Add details about the user who created the ressource.|
| UserUpdate | Add details about the user who last updated the ressource.|
schema.title: PricingTableExtra

parameters.name: IdUserCreation
parameters.description: Filter by the id of the user who created the ressource.

parameters.name: DateCreationMin
parameters.description: Filter resources created from the selected date.

parameters.name: DateCreationMax
parameters.description: Filter resources created until the selected date.

parameters.name: IdUserUpdate
parameters.description: Filter by user id who made the last modification

parameters.name: DateUpdateMin
parameters.description: Filter resources updated after the selected date.

parameters.name: DateUpdateMax
parameters.description: Filter resources updated before the selected date.
